---
title: "SLAM Metabolic Class Supplmental Figures"
author: "William Mueller"
data: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y %B %d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r sup figs setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(helphlme)
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggplotify)
library(sjPlot)
library(lme4)
library(cowplot)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(consoler)
library(flextable)
set.seed(365)

# setting global knitr options for r markdown output
knitr::opts_chunk$set(autodep = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE)
```

```{r sup figs read input yaml}
# for the case when we are not running with RStudio

all_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_all_bwfatgluc.yaml"
fb6_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fb6_bwfatgluc.yaml"
fhet3_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_fhet3_bwfatgluc.yaml"
mb6_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mb6_bwfatgluc.yaml"
mhet3_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-c10_age_mhet3_bwfatgluc.yaml"
itp_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/itp_c10c11c13c16_age_controls_bw.yaml"
held_out_path <- "../06_create_figures/output/slam_c1-10_x_slam_c16-18_age_bwfatgluc.yaml"
config <- NULL
```

```{r sup figs load models}
all_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = all_env,
  params = list(input_path = all_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
fb6_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = fb6_env,
  params = list(input_path = fb6_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
fhet3_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = fhet3_env,
  params = list(input_path = fhet3_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
mb6_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = mb6_env,
  params = list(input_path = mb6_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
mhet3_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = mhet3_env,
  params = list(input_path = mhet3_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
itp_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = itp_env,
  params = list(input_path = itp_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
held_out_env <- new.env()
rmarkdown::render("../07_display_figures/07_display_figures.Rmd",
  envir = held_out_env,
  params = list(input_path = held_out_path),
  quiet = TRUE
)
```

```{r sup figs fig no }
fig_no <- 1
tab_no <- 1
```

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: How it works

```{r sup figs how it works, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 6}
all_env$save_figtabs$how_it_works
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Kaplan Meier by Harmonizer

This may explain our trouble externally validating with cohorts 9 and 10, since
both have lower levels of survival

```{r sup figs kap plot by harmonize}
all_env$save_figtabs$harmonize_km[[1]][[1]]
flextabe(all_env$save_figtabs$harmonize_km[[1]][[2]])
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

```{r sup figs heights and widths}
pred_obs_height <- nrow(all_env$final_models) / 2 * 6
unique_class <- unique(all_env$final_models$census[[1]]$class)
dose_height_width <- sqrt(length(unique_class)) * 6
```

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: KM plots of covariates - By Sex

```{r sup figs plot km covs}
all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[1]][[1]]
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[1]][[2]])

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: KM plots of covariates - By Strain

```{r sup figs plot km covs}
all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[2]][[1]]
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$cov_km[[2]][[2]])

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of Outcome Variables - Complete and Training Data

```{r sup figs disply hist outcome panel, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
all_env$save_figtabs$hist_outcome_plot_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of log transform of outcome Variables - Complete and Training Data

```{r sup figs disply hist log outcome panel, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
all_env$save_figtabs$hist_log_outcome_plot_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Histogram of probability of class membership - Complete Data

```{r sup figs disply hist class prob panel, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
all_env$save_figtabs$hist_plot_panel

fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Cumulative

```{r sup figs cumulative validation plots, fig.width = 36, fig.height = 36}
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = all_env$save_figtabs$cumulative_validation_lots)
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Window

```{r sup figs window validation plots, fig.width = 36, fig.height = 36}
cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = all_env$save_figtabs$window_validation_lots)
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Interval

```{r sup figs interval validation plots, fig.width = 36, fig.height = 36}
plot_grid(plotlist = all_env$save_figtabs$interval_validation_lots)
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Display Testing Data - Proportion Resampled


```{r sup figs resampled validation plots, fig.width = 36, fig.height = 36}
plot_grid(plotlist = all_env$save_figtabs$resampled_validation_lots)
fig_no <- fig_no + 1
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 1

```{r sup figs hc1 }
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 1.jpg")
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 2

```{r sup figs hc2 }
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 2.jpg")
```

\newpage

### Figure `r as.character(fig_no)`: Healthcard Supplemental 3

```{r sup figs hc3 }
knitr::include_graphics("images/HC Suppl 3.jpg")
```

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Descriptive Census Information

```{r sup_tables describe prob class, results = 'asis'}
flextable(round(all_env$save_figtabs$describe_census, digits = 3)) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 7.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Descriptive Statistics of Outcomes, Age, Measure Frequency, and Age Difference Between measures for complete, training, and testing datasets

```{r sup_tables dataset info complete and training, results = 'asis'}
flextable(rbind(
  all_env$save_figtabs$sum_data,
  all_env$save_figtabs$sum_test
)) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Missing Data Descriptive Statistics of Outcomes, Age, Measure Frequency, and Age Difference Between measures for complete, training, and testing datasets

```{r sup_tables dataset info missing complete and training, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$sum_missing) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)


tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Median Life Expectancy Data

```{r sup_tables census information, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$table_mle) %>%
  autofit() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 6.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LCM Model Information

```{r sup_tables lcmm concise, results = 'asis'}
all_env$save_figtabs$lcmm_table %>%
  dplyr::rename(`Smallest Class %` = `Smallest.Class....`) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(`Smallest Class %` = round(`Smallest Class %`, digits = 3)) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 5.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LCM Posterior Probabilities

```{r sup_tables lcmm model average posterior probs, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$post_prob_table) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 7.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Candidate LCMs

```{r sup_tables compare all models, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$all_models_table) %>%
  fontsize(size = 3, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: LME Information

```{r sup_tables lme table}
all_env$save_figtabs$lme_table %>%
  mutate(sigma = round(sigma, digits = 3)) %>%
  mutate(loglik = round(loglik, digits = 0)) %>%
  mutate(AICtab = round(AICtab, digits = 0)) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 6.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Individual Cox Information

```{r sup_tables table coxzph individual cox model, results = 'asis'}
flextable(all_env$save_figtabs$individual_coxzph_tables) %>%
  theme_vanilla() %>%
  fontsize(size = 5.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0)

tab_no <- 1 + tab_no
```

\newpage

### Supplemental Table `r as.character(tab_no)`: Combined Cox Information

```{r sup_tables table coxzph combined cox model, results = 'asis'}
all_env$save_figtabs$combined_coxzph_tables %>%
  mutate(df = round(df, digits = 2)) %>%
  select(-outcome) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  theme_vanilla()
fontsize(size = 5.5, part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  fit_to_width(width = 6.5) %>%
  set_table_properties(layout = "autofit", width = 0) %>%
  tab_no() <- 1 + tab_no
```
